name: MonthlyTreasuryRecord
description: A single record from the Monthly Treasury Statement.

record_date.description: Record date (last day of the month).

current_month_rcpt_outly_amt.description: Current month receipts or outlays in U.S. dollars.

current_fytd_rcpt_outly_amt.description: Fiscal year to date receipts or outlays in U.S. dollars.

prior_yr_fytd_rcpt_outly_amt.description: Prior year fiscal year to date amount.
